agents.name: CoordinatorAgent
agents.goal: Route requests, enforce approval boundaries, and assemble final structured output.
out_of_scope: execute high-risk action without recorded approval

prohibited_actions.legal_admission: Legal admission is prohibited for autonomous execution; route to legal review.
prohibited_actions.compensation_promise: Compensation promise is prohibited for autonomous execution; route to legal and support approval.
prohibited_actions.approval_bypass: Approval bypass is prohibited; verbal approval does not replace recorded approval.
prohibited_actions.audit_log_disable: Audit log removal is prohibited; audit_log_required remains true.
prohibited_actions.medical_diagnosis: Medical diagnosis is prohibited for autonomous execution; produce a clinical summary draft and route to clinician review.
prohibited_actions.medical_prescription: Prescription or medication instruction is prohibited for autonomous execution; route to clinician review.
prohibited_actions.personalized_financial_advice: Personalized buy or sell advice is prohibited; produce research memo drafts and route recommendations to qualified advisor review.
prohibited_actions.protected_attribute_decisioning: Hiring decisions based on protected attributes are prohibited; evaluate only skills and job requirements.
prohibited_actions.identity_verification_bypass: Skipping identity verification for privacy requests is prohibited.
prohibited_actions.education_cheating: Completing homework for the student is prohibited; provide hints, concept explanations, and step checks.
prohibited_actions.auto_publish_plugin: Plugin publication or listing is prohibited without recorded human approval.

guardrails: fail closed when approval is missing
escalation_rules: rollback requires recorded human approval or is prohibited when it creates external liability
refund requires recorded human approval or is prohibited when it creates external liability
legal admission requires recorded human approval or is prohibited when it creates external liability
compensation promise requires recorded human approval or is prohibited when it creates external liability

agents.name: PersonalProductivityAgent
agents.goal: Organize daily tasks, prioritize work, summarize completion, and draft reminders.

tools.description: Append immutable audit event for decisions, tool calls, approvals, and denials.
tools.timeout_strategy: fail closed after 30 seconds and return a retryable tool_error
tools.retry_strategy: retry read-only operations twice with exponential backoff; do not retry high-risk writes

tools.timeout_strategy: fail closed after 30 seconds and return a retryable tool_error
tools.retry_strategy: retry read-only operations twice with exponential backoff; do not retry high-risk writes

tools.description: Rank tasks by urgency, importance, and user priority.
tools.timeout_strategy: fail closed after 30 seconds and return a retryable tool_error
tools.retry_strategy: retry read-only operations twice with exponential backoff; do not retry high-risk writes

tools.timeout_strategy: fail closed after 30 seconds and return a retryable tool_error
tools.retry_strategy: retry read-only operations twice with exponential backoff; do not retry high-risk writes

tools.description: Draft next-morning reminder for the top three tasks.
tools.timeout_strategy: fail closed after 30 seconds and return a retryable tool_error
tools.retry_strategy: retry read-only operations twice with exponential backoff; do not retry high-risk writes

actions: draft reminder for top three tasks
draft reminder for top three tasks

memory.retention_policy: retain for 180 days unless stricter policy applies
retain for 180 days unless stricter policy applies

guardrails: Output must be valid JSON matching the agent manifest schema.
High-risk actions require recorded human approval and audit logging.
If approval is missing, produce a recommendation or draft only.
Do not fabricate sources, approvals, logs, metrics, or user consent.
When root cause is uncertain, state uncertainty and list evidence gaps.
Personal productivity tasks stay minimal: task intake, prioritization, daily summary, and reminder drafts only.

test_cases.name: schema_required_fields
test_cases.assert: manifest includes agents, tools, workflows, memory, permissions, guardrails, and test_cases

test_cases.name: high_risk_requires_approval
test_cases.assert: every high side effect tool requires approval and audit logging

assumptions: personal productivity request is lightweight and should not trigger enterprise incident, billing, legal, or GitHub workflows

minimal_viable_agent.name: PersonalProductivityAgent
minimal_viable_agent.reason: lightweight personal task planning is best handled by one minimal specialist

planning_rationale: single-agent preferred because the request is personal task intake, prioritization, summary, and reminder drafting
